Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets list the traces per case Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Observations All cases start with RA Then VF Then AE After AE variation Case 2 goes directly to AD Cases 1 and 3 have one or more RMI followed by VF then AD core sequence RA VF AE loop for RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the loop part After AE we might have RMI possibly multiple times then VF then back to checking if we need more RMI or proceed to AD the pattern is zero or more RMI followed by one VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: define the loop part RMI RMI VF X tau loop part X tau RMI RMI VF or VF is part of the loop

Name: Validation - PE
Text: test this against traces Case 2 AE tau AD Matches Case 1 AE RMI VF AD Matches Case 3 AE RMI RMI VF AD Matches

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: RMI RMI produces odd number of RMIs wrong need RMI tau for one or more RMI traces RMI or RMI RMI etc then VF perfect

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: block after AE is X tau RMI tau VF full tree RA VF AE X tau RMI tau VF AD SC AC nested binary

Name: Validation - PE
Text: verify trace generation Case 2 RA VF AE tau AD SC AC matches Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC matches Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC matches Fitness 100 Precision High Simplicity good

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: using operator definitions sequence XOR loop tau leaves construct nested RA VF AE X tau RMI tau VF AD SC AC
